message:
feat: Add itertools and contextlib `from X import *` support

- Add contextlib to runtime.Lib exports for DCE-friendly imports
- Add contextlib `import *` handler in from_imports.zig (13 exports)
- Add itertools `import *` handler in from_imports.zig (19 exports)
- Fix contextlib.zig test: var → const for unmutated variable

This follows the same pattern as stringprep and _testbuffer modules
for expanding star imports into explicit const declarations.
